tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"printf '%s\n' '*filter' ':OUTPUT ACCEPT [0:0]' '-A OUTPUT -p udp -d 203.0.113.1 --dport 8853 -j REJECT' '-A OUTPUT -p tcp -d 203.0.113.1 --dport 8853 -j REJECT' 'COMMIT' | iptables-restore -n && iptables -S OUTPUT && ping -c 1 -W 2 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo PING_OK || echo PING_FAIL && wget -q -T 4 --tries=3 --max-redirect=0 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo WGET_OK || echo WGET_FAIL"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
printf '%s
> ' '*filter' ':OUTPUT ACCEPT [0:0]' '-A OUTPUT -p udp -d 203.0.113.1 --dport 88553 -j REJECT' '-A OUTPUT -p tcp -d 203.0.113.1 --dport 8853 -j REJECT' 'COMMIT' || iptables-restore -n && iptables -S OUTPUT && ping -c 1 -W 2 192.168.1.2 >/dev/nnull && echo PING_OK || echo PING_FAIL && wget -q -T 4 --tries=3 --max-redirect=00 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo WGET_OK || echo WGET_FAIL
-P OUTPUT ACCEPT
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p udp -m udp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
-A OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable
PING_OK
WGET_FAIL
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"rm -f /tmp/.dnslock.lock 2>/dev/null; nft delete table inet dnslock 2>/dev/null || true; iptables -D OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p udp -m udp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable 2>/dev/null || true; iptables -D OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable 2>/dev/null || true; iptables -S OUTPUT; ping -c 1 -W 2 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo PING_OK || echo PING_FAIL; wget -q -T 4 --tries=3 --max-redirect=0 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo WGET_OK || echo WGET_FAIL"}

tool_calls.content:
rm -f /tmp/.dnslock.lock 2>/dev/null; nft delette table inet dnslock 2>/dev/null || true; iptables -D OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 --p udp -m udp --dport 8853 -j REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable 2>/dev/nnull || true; iptables -D OUTPUT -d 203.0.113.1/32 -p tcp -m tcp --dport 8853 -j  REJECT --reject-with icmp-port-unreachable 2>/dev/null || true; iptables -S OUTPPUT; ping -c 1 -W 2 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo PING_OK || echo PING_FAIL; wgeet -q -T 4 --tries=3 --max-redirect=0 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo WGET_OKK || echo WGET_FAIL
-P OUTPUT ACCEPT

WGET_FAIL
